TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Ka tou ourou ki'Ou-vava-toug-han ki Hali-da eu-an, irou kavana-'an ti Jesus ka ierrou-âto ta kidi ki tæ'lei tyn, ki sah-tounnoun-eih tyn tou næi k'atta mou-koua ti Rama-an, ma-ma ki ni-kavæ'angö-en tyn ta a teni ka æ-i-a næy, komma-hynna ni-kavæ angö-en tyn neini-æn tou kidi ki lymmou lymmou.

Ka tou ourou ki'Ou-vava-toug-han ki Hali-da eu-an, irou kavana-'an ti Jesus ka ierrou-âto ta kidi ki tæ'lei tyn, ki sah-tounnoun-eih tyn tou næi k'atta mou-koua ti Rama-an, ma-ma ki ni-kavæ'angö-en tyn ta a teni ka æ-i-a næy, komma-hynna ni-kavæ angö-en tyn neini-æn tou kidi ki lymmou lymmou.
S.TRANSL: Ende boor het Feest ban Pascha Jesus wetende Dat sijne uyre gekomen was dat hy uyt dese wereldt soude obergaen tot den Dader alsoo hy De sijne Die in de wereldt waren lief gehadt hadde soo heeft hyse lief gehadt tot den eynde.

Now before the feast of the passover, when Jesus knew that his hour was come that he should depart out of this world unto the Father, having loved his own which were in the world, he loved them unto the end.
逾越節以前，耶穌知道自己離世歸父的時候到了。他既然愛世間屬自己的人，就愛他們到底。

S.FORM: Irou ka'i-kah-'an ta Hiaddoudoung-en (dou ni-pou-raryh ta Littou tou tintin ti Judas ka ti Simon Iskariot ki si-vanna vann'-eih tyn tyni-æn)
Irou ka'i-kah-'an ta Hiaddoudoung-en (dou ni-pou-raryh ta Littou tou tintin ti Judas ka ti Simon Iskariot ki si-vanna vann'-eih tyn tyni-æn)
S.TRANSL: Ende als het Abondtmael gedaen Mas (Doe nu De Duybel in Het herte ban Judas Simonis A Istariot gegeben hadde Dat hy hem berraden soude)
And supper being ended, the devil having now put into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon's son, to betray him;
吃晚飯的時候，魔鬼已將賣耶穌的意思放在西門的兒子加略人猶大心裏。

S.FORM: Dou kavana-an ti Jesus ka ni-pæ'ǣ-ymd-den ta mamang pi'ǣ ki Rama tou rima tyni-en, ka ni-pakka-kou-'an tyn ki Alid, ka mi-likough-âl-appa mou-koua ki Alid,
Dou kavana-an ti Jesus ka ni-pæ'ǣ-ymd-den ta mamang pi'ǣ ki Rama tou rima tyni-en, ka ni-pakka-kou-'an tyn ki Alid, ka mi-likough-âl-appa mou-koua ki Alid,
S.TRANSL: Jesus wetende dat De Dader Hem alle dinghen in de han den gegeben hadde enDe Dat hy ban Godt uyt gegaen was ende tot Godt hemen gingh
Jesus knowing that the Father had given all things into his hands, and that he was come from God, and went to God;
耶穌知道父已將萬有交在他手裏，且知道自己是從上帝出來的，又要歸到上帝那裏去，

S.FORM: Ni-æhpit ki ni-Hiaddoudoung-en, ka ni-tmoura ki kou-lamogh [tyn,] ka dou ara tyn ta äit, ni-mäit tyni-æn.
Ni-æhpit ki ni-Hiaddoudoung-en, ka ni-tmoura ki kou-lamogh [tyn,] ka dou ara tyn ta äit, ni-mäit tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Stont op ban het Abondtmael endeleyde [sijne] kleederen af ende nemende eenen lijnen Doeck omgordde Hem selben.
He riseth from supper, and laid aside his garments; and took a towel, and girded himself.
就離席站起來，脫了衣服，拿一條手巾束腰，

S.FORM: Si-ǣæug ki anna ni-roudou-en tyn ta raloum tou' padadiei-en; ka ni-madiei ki rahpal ki Pah-tatæu tæu-han, ka ni-rihkagh-appa ki ait ka ht-tæn tyn.
Si-ǣæug ki anna ni-roudou-en tyn ta raloum tou' padadiei-en; ka ni-madiei ki rahpal ki Pah-tatæu tæu-han, ka ni-rihkagh-appa ki ait ka ht-tæn tyn.
S.TRANSL: Daer nae goot hy water in het becken ende begon De boeten Der Discipelen te wasschen ende af te broogen met met den lijnen doeck daer mede hy omngordt Was.
After that he poureth water into a bason, and began to wash the disciples' feet, and to wipe them with the towel wherewith he was girded.
隨後把水倒在盆裏，就洗門徒的腳，並用自己所束的手巾擦乾。

S.FORM: Annata ni-mou-koua ti Simon Petrus-an, ka teni ta ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, padiei-ei-'mhou kauwa ta rahpal-au?
Annata ni-mou-koua ti Simon Petrus-an, ka teni ta ni-k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, padiei-ei-'mhou kauwa ta rahpal-au?
S.TRANSL: Hy dan quam tot Simon Petrus ende die seyde tot hem heere sult Ghy my De boeten wasschen ?
Then cometh he to Simon Peter: and Peter saith unto him, Lord, dost thou wash my feet?
挨到西門‧彼得，彼得對他說：「主啊，你洗我的腳嗎？」

S.FORM: Ni-matuK'i-v'llita ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Assi-kow mou-mhga hnyn ta ryngei-au, ri mou-mhga-ah-kow rourouman.
Ni-matuK'i-v'llita ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Assi-kow mou-mhga hnyn ta ryngei-au, ri mou-mhga-ah-kow rourouman.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde en seyde tot hem Dat ick Doe en Weet ghy Nu niet Maer ghy sult het na de sen berstaen.
Jesus answered and said unto him, What I do thou knowest not now; but thou shalt know hereafter.
耶穌回答說：「我所做的，你如今不知道，後來必明白。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma tati Petrus tyni-n, Assi kowmadi ei-a' ki rahpal-au-tou yhkakouan myddaryn nough. Ni-matt'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Heirou assi-koh ma-diei ymhou-an, a'ou-si-ah kow ki ætæh lam jau-an.
Ni-k'ma tati Petrus tyni-n, Assi kowmadi ei-a' ki rahpal-au-tou yhkakouan myddaryn nough. Ni-matt'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Heirou assi-koh ma-diei ymhou-an, a'ou-si-ah kow ki ætæh lam jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Petrus seyde tot hem Ghy en sult mijne boeten niet wasschen in Der eeuwigheyt Jesus antwoordde hem InDien ick u niet en wassche ghy en Hebt geen deel met my.
Peter saith unto him, Thou shalt never wash my feet. Jesus answered him, If I wash thee not, thou hast no part with me.
彼得說：「你永不可洗我的腳！」耶穌說：「我若不洗你，你就與我無分了。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Simon Petrus tyni-æn, Meirang, assi dyk ki rahpal-au, ra ki rimaki voungo-appa.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Simon Petrus tyni-æn, Meirang, assi dyk ki rahpal-au, ra ki rimaki voungo-appa.
S.TRANSL: Simon Petrus seyde tot hem Heere niet alleen mijne boeten maer oock De handen ende het Hooft.
Simon Peter saith unto him, Lord, not my feet only, but also my hands and my head.
西門‧彼得說：「主啊，不但我的腳，連手和頭也要洗。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ti mamang ta ni-i-æug assi mæ-i-ææpo dyk ki padiei-en ki-rahpal:rA ma-tmouk-ato makoup-tigh. Ka makouptig-kamou, rs assi ma-ymmid.
Ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Ti mamang ta ni-i-æug assi mæ-i-ææpo dyk ki padiei-en ki-rahpal:rA ma-tmouk-ato makoup-tigh. Ka makouptig-kamou, rs assi ma-ymmid.
S.TRANSL: Jesus seyde tot hem Die gewasschen is en Heeft niet ban noode Dan De boeten te wasschen maer is geheel reyn. Ende ghy-lieden zijt reyn doch niet alle.
Jesus saith to him, He that is washed needeth not save to wash his feet, but is clean every whit: and ye are clean, but not all.
耶穌說：「凡洗過澡的人，只要把腳一洗，全身就乾淨了。你們是乾淨的，然而不都是乾淨的。」

S.FORM: Kakavana-an tyn ti-mang ta fsi-vanna vanna-ah tyni-æn: alei ki anna ka koun tyn, A ssi-ka-mou ma-ymmid makouptigh.
Kakavana-an tyn ti-mang ta fsi-vanna vanna-ah tyni-æn: alei ki anna ka koun tyn, A ssi-ka-mou ma-ymmid makouptigh.
S.TRANSL: Want hy wist wie hem berraden soude : daerom seyde hy Ghy en zijt niet alle reyn.
For he knew who should betray him; therefore said he, Ye are not all clean.
耶穌原知道要賣他的是誰，所以說：「你們不都是乾淨的。」

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-madiei-ato ki rahpal nein, ka rou ni-alykkoug ki pammammi-æn tyn, ni-mila mierroung tou avok-kan,' ka ni-k'ma neini-æn, Mou-mhga-ka-mou kauwa ki na ryngei-au ymoumi-æn?
Irou ka ni-madiei-ato ki rahpal nein, ka rou ni-alykkoug ki pammammi-æn tyn, ni-mila mierroung tou avok-kan,' ka ni-k'ma neini-æn, Mou-mhga-ka-mou kauwa ki na ryngei-au ymoumi-æn?
S.TRANSL: Als hy dan hare boeten gewasschen ende sijne klederen genomen hadde sat hy wederom aen ende seyde tottot haer Derstaet ghy wat ick u-lieden gedaen hebbe?
So after he had washed their feet, and had taken his garments, and was set down again, he said unto them, Know ye what I have done to you?
耶穌洗完了他們的腳，就穿上衣服，又坐下，對他們說：「我向你們所做的，你們明白嗎？

S.FORM: Mananang-kamou jau-an Mahtæutæuugh ki Meirang-appa, ka mariang-kamou kisou: alei ka ti jau k'anna.
Mananang-kamou jau-an Mahtæutæuugh ki Meirang-appa, ka mariang-kamou kisou: alei ka ti jau k'anna.
S.TRANSL: Ghy heet my Meester ende Heere ende ghy seght wel :want ick ben't
Ye call me Master and Lord: and ye say well; for so I am.
你們稱呼我夫子，稱呼我主，你們說的不錯，我本來是。

S.FORM: Heirou ka ni-madiei-koh ti jau ka Meirang ki Mahtatæu-tæuugh-appa ki rahpal oumi, an-nata kidi-ato ka pati-tavætavæh-ei-moumi madiei ta rahpahpal-oumi.
Heirou ka ni-madiei-koh ti jau ka Meirang ki Mahtatæu-tæuugh-appa ki rahpal oumi, annata kidi-ato ka pati-tavætavæh-ei-moumi madiei ta rahpahpal-oumi.
S.TRANSL: Indien dan ick De Heere ende De Meester uwe boeten gewasschen hebbe soo zijt ghy oock schuldigh malkanders boeten te wasschen.
If I then, your Lord and Master, have washed your feet; ye also ought to wash one another's feet.
我是你們的主，你們的夫子，尚且洗你們的腳，你們也當彼此洗腳。

S.FORM: Ka ni-papei-kounnoung-en-nau-kamou-ra, mama ka ni-pam't-en-nau, ka mei-komma-ah-kamou hynna ta ymoumi.
Ka ni-papei-kounnoung-en-nau-kamou-ra, mama ka ni-pam't-en-nau, ka mei-komma-ah-kamou hynna ta ymoumi.
S.TRANSL: Want ick hebbe u een erempel gegeben Op Dat gelijcker wijs ick u gedaen hebbe ghy-lieden oock Doet.
For I have given you an example, that ye should do as I have done to you.
我給你們作了榜樣，叫你們照着我向你們所做的去做。

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Assi masaoun tou va-vau ki kidi ta koungcia ki Mei-rang tyn, assi masaoun tou vavau-ki kidi ta ni-padadingi-en ki ni-madingi tyni-æn.
Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Assi masaoun tou vavau ki kidi ta koungcia ki Mei-rang tyn, assi masaoun tou vavau-ki kidi ta ni-padadingi-en ki ni-madingi tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u Eendienst-knecht en is niet meerder Dan sijn geere noch een gesante meerder Dan Die Hem gesonden heeft.
Ick en segghe niet ban u allen : ick weet welcke ick uytberkooren hebbe : maer [dit geschiedt] op Dat De Schrift berbult werde Die met my het broodt eet beeft tegen my sijn berssen opgeheben.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, The servant is not greater than his lord; neither he that is sent greater than he that sent him.
我實實在在地告訴你們，僕人不能大於主人，差人也不能大於差他的人。

S.FORM: Heirou mavana-kamou ki mamang katta, tama-tæ'i-riang-kamou rou pam't-ten-oumi ta atta.
Heirou mavana-kamou ki mamang katta, tama-tæ'i-riang-kamou rou pam't-ten-oumi ta atta.
S.TRANSL: Indien ghy dese dins ghen weet saligh zijt ghy soo ghy de selbe Doet.
If ye know these things, happy are ye if ye do them.
你們既知道這事，若是去行就有福了。

S.FORM: Assi-koh mattæ'i-sal ymou-mi-æn: kavana-en-nau na ma-mang ta ni-peri-au: ra alei-appa ka pavæut-auh ta na Sasoulat, Teni ka mi-lam ki paoul jau-an, ni-p'lleiki ngouro tyn. mæ'æu-doumma jau-an.
Assi-koh mattæ'i-sal ymou-mi-æn: kavana-en-nau na ma-mang ta ni-peri-au: ra alei-appa ka pavæut-auh ta na Sasoulat, Teni ka mi-lam ki paoul jau-an, ni-p'lleiki ngouro tyn. mæ'æu-doumma jau-an.
S.TRANSL: I speak not of you all: I know whom I have chosen: but that the scripture may be fulfilled, He that eateth bread with me hath lifted up his heel against me.
我這話不是指着你們眾人說的，我知道我所揀選的是誰。現在要應驗經上的話，說：『同我吃飯的人用腳踢我。』

S.FORM: Vannavanna-en-nau-ka-mou hnyn, rou assi appa pa-væut tin, alei ka rou ni-pavut-ato, ka tna-'msing-ah-kamou ka ti jau kanna.
Vannavanna-en-nau-ka-mou hnyn, rou assi appa pa-væut tin, alei ka rou ni-pavut-ato, ka tna-'msing-ah-kamou ka ti jau kanna.
S.TRANSL: Dan Dan nu segghe ick het u-lieden eer het geschiet is op Dat wanneer het gefchiet sal zijn ghy gelooben meunght Dat ick het ben.
Now I tell you before it come, that, when it is come to pass, ye may believe that I am he.
如今事情還沒有成就，我要先告訴你們，叫你們到事情成就的時候可以信我是基督。

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, Heirou pahyh tatalaghta ti mamangki padadin-gi-en-nau, tenita pa-yhtatalagh jau-an, ti mamamang-appa ta pa-yhtatalaghj jau-an, tenita pa-yh-tatalagh tyni-æn ka ni-madingi jau-an.

Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou-ra, Heirou pahyh tatalaghta ti mamangki padadin-gi-en-nau, tenita pa-yhtatalagh jau-an, ti mamamang-appa ta pa-yhtatalaghj jau-an, tenita pa-yh-tatalagh tyni-æn ka ni-madingi jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u Soo ick yemandt sende wie [dien] ontsanght Die onsanght my ende wie my ontsanght die obtsanght hem Die my gesonden Heeft.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, He that receiveth whomsoever I send receiveth me; and he that receiveth me receiveth him that sent me.
我實實在在地告訴你們，有人接待我所差遣的，就是接待我；接待我，就是接待那差遣我的。」 （太26‧20－25；可14‧17－21；路22‧21－23）

S.FORM: Irou ka mattæ'i-kaha ta ti Jesus ki mamang k'atta, mierin-gau-ato ki voulas tou ryh tyn ,ka ni-gmail mattæ'i-æmah, ka ni koun tyn, Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, sa'sat ymoumi-n ta si-vanna vanna-ah jau-an.

Irou ka mattæ'i-kaha ta ti Jesus ki mamang k'atta, mierin-gau-ato ki voulas tou ryh tyn ,ka ni-gmail mattæ'i-æmah, ka ni koun tyn, Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, sa'sat ymoumi-n ta si-vanna vanna-ah jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Jesus dese dingen geseght hebbende wierdt ontroert in Den geest ende betuyghde ende seyde Doorwaer boorwaer segghe ick u dat een ban u-lieden my sal berraden.
When Jesus had thus said, he was troubled in spirit, and testified, and said, Verily, verily, I say unto you, that one of you shall betray me.
耶穌說了這話，心裏憂愁，就明說：「我實實在在地告訴你們，你們中間有一個人要賣我了。」

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-mæsæ'-tati-migh ta Pæhtatæutu-han, pæh-dælæh timang lava ta pattæ'i mymmymi'-'n tyn.
Anna ta ni-mæsæ'-tati-migh ta Pæhtatæutu-han, pæh-dælæh timang lava ta pattæ'i mymmymi'-'n tyn.
S.TRANSL: De Discipulen Dan sagen op malkanderen twij= selede ban wien Hy [dat] seyde.
Then the disciples looked one on another, doubting of whom he spake.
門徒彼此對看，猜不透所說的是誰。

S.FORM: Ka sasat ki Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn ta ni-ghunni ki voungo tou æ-'iava ti Jefuus ka kavæ'ango-enti Jesus.
Ka sasat ki Pæhtatæutæu-han tyn ta ni-ghunni ki voungo tou æ-'iava ti Jefuus ka kavæ'ango-enti Jesus.
S.TRANSL: Ende een ban sijne Discipulen Was aensittende in Den schoot Jesu welcken Jesus lief hadde.
Now there was leaning on Jesus' bosom one of his disciples, whom Jesus loved.
有一個門徒，是耶穌所愛的，側身挨近耶穌的懷裏。

S.FORM: Tenitati-'k-patten ti Si-mon Petrus ka tetalyg-auh tyn, ti mang lava' ta ni-patt'æ'i-mym-mia tyn.
Tenitati-'k-patten ti Simon Petrus ka tetalyg-auh tyn, ti mang lava' ta ni-patt'æ'i-mym-mia tyn.
S.TRANSL: Simon Petrus Dan wenckte desen dat hy bragen soude wie hy Doch ware van welcken hy [dit] seyde.
Simon Peter therefore beckoned to him, that he should ask who it should be of whom he spake.
西門‧彼得點頭對他說：「你告訴我們，主是指着誰說的。」

S.FORM: Kateni kanna ta ni-ghun-ni tou av'u ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, ti mang tateni k'anna?
Kateni kanna ta ni-ghun-ni tou av'u ti Jesus k'ma tyni-æn, Meirang, ti mang tateni k'anna?
S.TRANSL: Ende dese ballende an De borst Jesu seyde tot hem Heere wie is't:
He then lying on Jesus' breast saith unto him, Lord, who is it?
那門徒便就勢靠着耶穌的胸膛，問他說：「主啊，是誰呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, Teni ta ti anna ka phǣ-ei-mau ki na pi ka na d'adauk-k'au: Irou ka ni-dadauk tyn ta na pi, ni-phæn tyn ti Judas-an ka ti Simon Iskariot.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus, Teni ta ti anna ka phǣ-ei-mau ki na pi ka na d'adauk-k'au: Irou ka ni-dadauk tyn ta na pi, ni-phæn tyn ti Judas-an ka ti Simon Iskariot.
S.TRANSL: Je. Jesus antwoordde Dese is't dien ick De bete als ickse ingedoopt hebbe geben sal: Ende als hy De bete ingedoopt hadde gaf hyse Jude Simonis Iscariot.
Jesus answered, He it is, to whom I shall give a sop, when I have dipped it. And when he had dipped the sop, he gave it to Judas Iscariot, the son of Simon.
耶穌回答說：「我蘸一點餅給誰，就是誰。」耶穌就蘸了一點餅，遞給加略人西門的兒子猶大。

S.FORM: Karou ni-'ara tyn tana pi k'anna, ni-sa-ra rbou ta Littou ty-ni-æn. Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Kamamang ka pam't-ei-mhou mei-dyss-â.
Karou ni-'ara tyn tana pi k'anna, ni-sa-ra rbou ta Littou ty-ni-æn. Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Kamamang ka pam't-ei-mhou mei-dyss-â.
S.TRANSL: Ende na De bete Doe boer De Satan in hem. Jesus Dan seyde tot hem. Dat ghy Doet Doet Het haestelick
And after the sop Satan entered into him. Then said Jesus unto him, That thou doest, do quickly.
他吃了以後，撒但就入了他的心。耶穌便對他說：「你所做的，快做吧！」

S.FORM: Ka assi mou mhga ki atta ta ti mamang neini-æn ka mie-roung hynna, alei kimang ka pa-sousou-en tyn [ta atta] tyni-æn.
Ka assi mou mhga ki atta ta ti mamang neini-æn ka mie-roung hynna, alei kimang ka pa-sousou-en tyn [ta atta] tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Ende dit en berstandt miemandt der gene Die aen saten waer toe hy hem [dat] seyde.
Now no man at the table knew for what intent he spake this unto him.
同席的人沒有一個知道是為甚麼對他說這話。

S.FORM: Ka ni-pæhdimdim ta ra-rouma, alei ka mei-pauti ta ti Judas, ka pa-sousou-en ti Jesus tyni-æn, Peila-auto ki mǣ-iææpo-kyt-ta tou 'Ou-vavatoug-han, ka pi'æ-âl-ato lava ta teni ki-ma-mang ki malymmouk.
Ka ni-pæhdimdim ta ra-rouma, alei ka mei-pauti ta ti Judas, ka pa-sousou-en ti Jesus tyni-æn, Peila-auto ki mǣ-iææpo-kyt-ta tou 'Ou-vavatoug-han, ka pi'æ-âl-ato lava ta teni ki-ma-mang ki malymmouk.
S.TRANSL: Want sommige meynden Dewijle Judas De burse hadde dat hem Jesus seyde Koopt het ghene wy ban nooDe Hebben tot het Feest ofte dat hy Den armen wat geben soude.
For some of them thought, because Judas had the bag, that Jesus had said unto him, Buy those things that we have need of against the feast; or, that he should give something to the poor.
有人因猶大帶着錢囊，以為耶穌是對他說：「你去買我們過節所應用的東西」，或是叫他拿甚麼賙濟窮人。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-'ara tyn ta na pi k'anna ni-madys sa-mamala. Ka euvænnæn ta kidi.
Irou ka ni-'ara tyn ta na pi k'anna ni-madys sa-mamala. Ka euvænnæn ta kidi.
S.TRANSL: . Hy dan de bete genomen hebbende ging terstont uyt. Ende het was nacht.
He then having received the sop went immediately out: and it was night.
猶大受了那點餅，立刻就出去。那時候是夜間了。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-sa-mamala ta te-ni, ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, Pou-vavau-en-ato hnyn ki kidi ta Alak ki kæ-euloung, ka pou-vavau-in-nappa ki kidi ta Alid tyni-æn.
Irou ka ni-sa-mamala ta te-ni, ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, Pou-vavau-en-ato hnyn ki kidi ta Alak ki kæ-euloung, ka pou-vavau-in-nappa ki kidi ta Alid tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Als hy Dan uytgegaen was seyde Jesus. Nu is De Sone des menschen berheerlickt ende Godt is in hem berheerlickt.
Therefore, when he was gone out, Jesus said, Now is the Son of man glorified, and God is glorified in him.
他既出去，耶穌就說：「如今人子得了榮耀，上帝在人子身上也得了榮耀。

S.FORM: Heirou ni-pou-vavau-in ki kidi ta Alid tyni-æn pouvavau-âl-appa ki kidi tyni-æn, ta Alid ty-ni-æn mamadou, ka pou-dis-ah pouvavau ki kidi tyni-æn.
Heirou ni-pou-vavau-in ki kidi ta Alid tyni-æn pouvavau-âl-appa ki kidi tyni-æn, ta Alid ty-ni-æn mamadou, ka pou-dis-ah pouvavau ki kidi tyni-æn.
S.TRANSL: Indien Godt in hem berheerlickt is soo sal ook Godt Hem berheerlicken in hem selben ende hy sal hem terst ont berherlicken.
If God be glorified in him, God shall also glorify him in himself, and shall straightway glorify him.
上帝要因自己榮耀人子，並且要快快地榮耀他。

S.FORM: Kallalak, assi madallia ka æ-i-a-lam-app-'oh ymoumiæn. Kmi'ym-ah-kamou jau-an ka ma-ma ki ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ki Joden, Tou sah-ka-koua-ei-mau assi-kamou malpougah ierroua, mat-ti[komma-hynna]-app'oh hnyn ymoumi-n.

Kallalak, assi madallia ka æ-i-a-lam-app-'oh ymoumiæn. Kmi'ym-ah-kamou jau-an ka ma-ma ki ni-pa-sousou-en-nau ki Joden, Tou sah-ka-koua-ei-mau assi-kamou malpougah ierroua, mat-ti[komma-hynna]-app'oh hnyn ymoumi-n.
S.TRANSL: KinKinderkens noch eenen kleynen [tijdt] ben ick by u. Ghy sult my soecken ende gheliick ick Den Joden geseght hebbe Daer ick henen gae en kondt ghy niet Komen [alsoo] segge ick u-lieden nu oock.
Little children, yet a little while I am with you. Ye shall seek me: and as I said unto the Jews, Whither I go, ye cannot come; so now I say to you.
小子們，我還有不多的時候與你們同在；後來你們要找我，但我所去的地方你們不能到。這話我曾對猶太人說過，如今也照樣對你們說。

S.FORM: Væ'æu ki pahkou-sasou ta pæpæ-au ymoumi-æn, ka makka-nænædo-ah-kamou makka-va-væ'ings. Mama ki ni kavæ'æn-go-en-nau ymousmi-æn, ka mak-ka naneds-ah kamo komma-hynna makka-væve'angs.
Væ'æu ki pahkou-sasou ta pæpæ-au ymoumi-æn, ka makka-nænædo-ah-kamou makka-va-væ'ings. Mama ki ni kavæ'æn-go-en-nau ymousmi-æn, ka makka naneds-ah kamo komma-hynna makka-væve'angs.
S.TRANSL: Een nieuw gebodt gebe ick u dat ghy malkanderen lief hebt. Geliick ick u lief ghehadt hebbe Dat oock ghy malkanderen lief hebt.
A new commandment I give unto you, That ye love one another; as I have loved you, that ye also love one another.
我賜給你們一條新命令，乃是叫你們彼此相愛；我怎樣愛你們，你們也要怎樣相愛。

S.FORM: Tou atta k-'ym'd-dah ta neni kmalang, ka Pahta tæutæu-en-nau-kamou ta ymoumi, dou makka-nænædo-kamou makka-vævæ'ango.
Tou atta k-'ym'd-dah ta neni kmalang, ka Pahta tæutæu-en-nau-kamou ta ymoumi, dou makka-nænædo-kamou makka-vævæ'ango.
S.TRANSL: Hier aen sullen sy alle bekennen dat ghy mijne Discipelen zijt soo ghy liefde hebt onder malkanderen.
By this shall all men know that ye are my disciples, if ye have love one to another.
你們若有彼此相愛的心，眾人因此就認出你們是我的門徒了。」 （太26‧ 31 －35；可14‧27 －31；路22‧31－34）

S.FORM: Ni-k'mata ti Simon Petrus tyni-æn, Meirang, 'marang-ah-kow mou-koua tou-mang? Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Tou sah-kakoua-ei-mau, assi-kow smala-lpough hnyn smala-dyllough jau-an: ra smala-dyl-lough-ah-kow dou rouman.

Ni-k'mata ti Simon Petrus tyni-æn, Meirang, 'marang-ah-kow mou-koua tou-mang? Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus tyni-æn, Tou sah-kakoua-ei-mau, assi-kow smala-lpough hnyn smala-dyllough jau-an: ra smala-dyl-lough-ah-kow dou rouman.
S.TRANSL: Simon Petrus seyDe tot hem Heere waer gaet ghy henen : Jesus antwoordde hem Daer ick henen gae en kont ghy my nu niet bolghen : maer ghy sult my na= maels bolgen.
Simon Peter said unto him, Lord, whither goest thou? Jesus answered him, Whither I go, thou canst not follow me now; but thou shalt follow me afterwards.
西門‧彼得問耶穌說：「主往哪裏去？」耶穌回答說：「我所去的地方，你現在不能跟我去，後來卻要跟我去。」

S.FORM: Ni-k'mata ti Petrus tyni-æn, Meirang, ka-oumang ka assi-koh smala-lpough hnyn ima-la 'dyllough ymhou-an? Pou-koua-ah-koh pou-v'lli ymhou-an ki k'uag-han-au.
Ni-k'mata ti Petrus tyni-æn, Meirang, ka-oumang ka assi-koh smala-lpough hnyn ima-la 'dyllough ymhou-an? Pou-koua-ah-koh pou-v'lli ymhou-an ki k'uag-han-au.
S.TRANSL: Petrus seyde tot hem Heere waerom en kan ick u nu niet bolgen : Ick sal mijn leben boor u setten.
Peter said unto him, Lord, why cannot I follow thee now? I will lay down my life for thy sake.
彼得說：「主啊，我為甚麼現在不能跟你去？我願意為你捨命！」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli tati Jesus tyni-æn, Pou-koua-ei-mhou kau-wa pou-b'lli jauan ta kæuag-han hou? Missing, missing koun-nau-kow, assi mouni-ah ta taoukka kou assi kow't-touroul-ato rmau jau-an.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli tati Jesus tyni-æn, Pou-koua-ei-mhou kau-wa pou-b'lli jauan ta kæuag-han hou? Missing, missing koun-nau-kow, assi mouni-ah ta taoukka kou assi kow't-touroul-ato rmau jau-an.
S.TRANSL: Jesus antwoordde hem hem Sult ghy u leben boor my setten : Doorwaer boorwaer segge ick u De haen en sal niet kraeyem tot Dat ghy my driemael berloochent sult hebben.
Jesus answered him, Wilt thou lay down thy life for my sake? Verily, verily, I say unto thee, The cock shall not crow, till thou hast denied me thrice.
耶穌說：「你願意為我捨命嗎？我實實在在地告訴你，雞叫以先，你要三次不認我。」
